t: @Ademba_47 In 1991/92, the then Moi regime curved out bungoma district and created sabaot, and imported thousands of Sebei from Uganda in order to boost the population of the sabaot and to rig the elections.  It took the kdf to deport them in 2007. Many Kenyans lost their lives
exp: This post discusses historical demographic manipulation in Bungoma district, claiming the Moi regime imported Ugandan Sebei people to influence elections, requiring KDF intervention for deportation. While discussing ethnic politics, it presents this as historical fact without hateful language toward any group.
